overview.definition: Pneumonia is a lung infection that makes breathing difficult. Your lungs get filled with fluid or pus, making it hard to breathe.
overview.severity: Can range from mild to life-threatening
overview.contagious: Some types spread between people, others don't

viral.description: Like a bad flu, caused by viruses
viral.treatment: Rest, fluids, symptom relief (antibiotics don't work for viruses)

fungal.description: Less common, affects people with weak immune systems

aspiration.description: Caused by breathing in food, liquid, or vomit
aspiration.risk: Common in elderly or people with swallowing problems

common: Cough with mucus (yellow, green, or bloody)
High fever with chills and sweating
Hard time breathing or catching breath
Sharp chest pain when breathing or coughing
symptoms.timeline: Symptoms start suddenly over a few days
severity_signs: Very high fever that won't go down
Coughing up a lot of blood

high_risk_groups: Smokers and people with lung disease
People with chronic diseases (diabetes, heart disease)

tests: Chest X-ray - Shows white cloudy areas in lungs
Sputum test - Checks mucus for bacteria
Pleural fluid culture (if fluid around lungs)
xray_findings: White cloudy area (consolidation) - looks like fog in lungs
Can be in any part of lungs
Sometimes fluid at bottom of lungs

home_care: Drink lots of water and fluids
mild_cases.duration: Most people feel better in 1-3 weeks

reasons: Very high or very low blood pressure

recovery: Week 1: Start feeling a bit better
Week 2-3: Much better, but still tired
Week 4-6: Back to normal for most people
Cough may last 4-6 weeks even after getting better

warning_signs: Can't keep down food or medicine

vaccines: Flu vaccine (flu can lead to pneumonia)

when_to_call_doctor: Cough gets worse or produces bloody mucus
Confusion or change in mental awareness
Not getting better after 3-5 days of antibiotics

prognosis.general: Most healthy people recover fully with treatment
factors: Faster recovery if young and healthy
Slower recovery if elderly or have other health problems
Type of pneumonia affects recovery time
